HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RICK DARNELL'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. RICK DARNELL HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: ANN MENDOZA, CSR #6812 (206)

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RICK DARNELL'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND COURT REPORTERS' FEES ARE DENIED. RICK DARNELL HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: ANN MENDOZA, CSR #6812 (206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF RICK DARNELL ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $22.85 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAMBERT, ANDREW
